    Method
    Description
    GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    GeneratorRegistry.Builder.registerColumnNamePattern(String regex, GeneratorFactory factory)
    Registers a generator for columns whose name matches the given regular expression.
    GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    GeneratorRegistry.Builder.registerJdbcType(JDBCType jdbcType, GeneratorFactory factory)
    Registers a generator override for a JDBCType.
    GeneratorRegistry.Builder
    GeneratorRegistry.Builder.registerTypeName(String typeName, GeneratorFactory factory)
    Registers a generator for columns whose database-specific type name equals the given value, ignoring case (e.g.
